texto: At nineteen, one lives in the utter idolatry, therefore the extreme superstition, of sex. Monstrously exaggerated tales about sexual feats, which we listen to greedily, determine our expectations. The disappointments are correspondingly great.
explicacao: Citação de Gregor von Rezzori sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “At nineteen, one lives in the utter idolatry, therefore the extreme superstition, of sex. Monstro…” articula vida, sex, youth em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como youth.
